division_title: PENALTIES AND DISPOSITION OF FEES, FINES, AND FORFEITURES
text: No money in the Motor Vehicle Account in the State Transportation Fund may be expended for automobile driver training.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 18. PENALTIES AND DISPOSITION OF FEES, FINES, AND FORFEITURES [42000 - 42277]
### Chapter 3. Motor Vehicle Account [42270 - 42277]
##### § 42277

No money in the Motor Vehicle Account in the State Transportation Fund may be expended for automobile driver training.

*(Added by Stats. 1984, Ch. 94, Sec. 1.)*

subsections.text: No money in the Motor Vehicle Account in the State Transportation Fund may be expended for automobile driver training.
